One, I'll just share a little bit of how we structure our engagements, and I can show you just very quick, because I know we're limited on time, how we think and build strategy, because I do think that's a key differentiator to how we think and operate versus leveraging a typical AI solution.
For one, what we do is we start with a two-phase approach.
We start with what we call a strategy sprint.
There's a lot of different deliverables that come in this.
It's a six- eight-week program.

A lot of different deliverables around insights, competitive analyses, developing voice tone, and a lot of different artifacts, going back to what we were mentioning earlier, that can be, first, we align and make sure they're dialed in, and can be leveraged as essentially AI-ready artifacts that can help us produce a lot of different types of content.
As needed.

The intention is, though, to de-risk a longer term engagement because we're really looking for those that are in it for that longer path of developing an organic program.

It's not that we, you know, we can't drive results early on, but more just trying to ensure before signing up for 12 months that there's a lot of understanding, high conviction and specificity to what we would ultimately execute on.
